description: Strategy: keep the repo on current stable versions without human chasing.
Minor/patch updates auto-merge when CI is green. Majors always require
human review (see ADR-0006 — centralised versions in pom.xml properties).
Runs on weekends to minimise weekday noise.

packageRules.description: Common rule : auto-merge patch + pin + digest after CI green. All 4 repos share this.
Auto-merge minor updates for well-behaved ecosystems (Maven plugins, dev/build deps). Major bumps still need review.
Docker base images — pin by digest for reproducibility, but still upgrade.
Never auto-merge SNAPSHOT dependencies (Maven snapshots, npm prerelease tags).
Group all Spring Boot artifacts — they must upgrade together.
Group all Micrometer / OTel artifacts — transitive compatibility.
Group Argo CD + Argo Rollouts charts / images — must upgrade together or controller versions drift from the CRDs they install.
Group External Secrets Operator — helm chart + CRDs + image must match; the CI CRD bundle in scripts/ci-k8s-test.sh is pinned to the same version.
Group Chaos Mesh — CRDs + image + helm chart. Same rationale as ESO: scripts/ci-k8s-test.sh pins CRD version.
Group Grafana LGTM stack components — Grafana/Tempo/Loki/Mimir/Pyroscope share release trains.
Group Kyverno chart + image so a policy engine bump lands atomically.
Group cert-manager chart + image — CRDs + controller must version-match.
Group all Maven plugin versions (properties ending .plugin.version) so a weekly sweep doesn't flood the MR board.

lockFileMaintenance.description: Refresh lockfiles weekly to pull in transitive dep patches.
